name: gradient-shift
title: GradientShift
description: A quiet, drifting two-color linear gradient background. The angle rotates at a constant degrees-per-frame — linear-by-design, no spring. Low-saturation defaults (--onda-surface to --onda-border) keep it atmospheric, never focal.
